name: screeps-dojo
description: Scenario test harness for Screeps bots: real engine, tick by tick, headless

scripts.import-room: docker compose run --rm dojo node scripts/importRoom.js
scripts.install:dojo: docker compose run --rm dojo npm install
scripts.smoke: docker compose run --rm dojo npm run smoke:inner
scripts.build:editor: docker compose run --rm dojo node scripts/buildEditor.js
scripts.build:ui: cd ui && npm install && npm run build
